ddls:
CREATE TABLE "metro_area" (
  "metro_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metropolitan area */,
  "metro_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the metropolitan area */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the state where the metropolitan area is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the metropolitan area */,
  "area_square_miles" REAL /* Area of the metropolitan area in square miles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metro_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupation" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "metro_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metropolitan area */,
  "metro_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the metropolitan area */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the industry */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the occupation */,
  "data_year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "employment" INTEGER /* Number of people employed in the metropolitan area */,
  "employment_per_thousand_jobs" REAL /* Employment per thousand jobs in the metropolitan area */,
  "location_quotient" REAL /* Location quotient for the metropolitan area */,
  "hourly_mean_wage" REAL /* Hourly mean wage for the metropolitan area */,
  "annual_mean_wage" REAL /* Annual mean wage for the metropolitan area */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metro_area_id", "industry_id", "occupation_id", "data_year")
)

CREATE TABLE "user" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
